g.text: Figure 1. Interference angle θ across seven scenarios — overview of governance regime classification

text.style: font-style: italic; font-size: 9.2px; font-family: 'Cambria', 'Libertinus Serif', 'DejaVu Serif', 'Times New Roman', serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #4a4a4a

g.text: Predictor states |ψN⟩ (dashed) plotted by their angular separation from the normative reference |ψS⟩ (solid, horizontal). Five CIRCUIT-BREAKER scenarios cluster at 127.8°–134.7° (destructive interference); two positive controls fall within the STAC band at 5.7°–7.1° (constructive interference).

text.style: font-style: italic; font-size: 8px; font-family: 'Cambria', 'Libertinus Serif', 'DejaVu Serif', 'Times New Roman', serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #4a4a4a

g.text: Source: outputs/e5_results/validation_results.parquet | Angular separation θ = arccos(⟨ψN|ψS⟩ / ‖ψN‖‖ψS‖) | Regime bands follow Q-FENG C1 pipeline specification (Kaminski 2026a, §7.4).
